title: Xaero's Skunks - Unofficial
description: Adds icons for Skunks - Remastered to Xaero's Minimap
body:
Adds Xaero's Minimap icons for **[Skunks - Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/skunk-remastered)**!
Go check it out! Skunks are dope ![vanilla skunk icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49eceea17b5e5e950dd06bbccc2adfbf136f765b.png)
